In order to get the best out of this section ensure you've been
through the foundations and testing modules of the core
training program.
Graduation Testing -
Speed vs Quality
Fast testing vs quality testing and the trade off between
time and money.
VIDEO 1
Country Level Grad Testing and Scaling
This will help you in understanding how to approach
country based testing and scaling how I prefer to setup
my structure. The framework is still based on the 4-funnel
system, adapted at the country level.
VIDEO 2
Facebook Split Testing for Offers
This is an important part of the testing process, using
Facebook's Split Test tool.
VIDEO 3
You can learn more about how to setup a split test tool via Facebook direct:
https://www.facebook.com/business/measurement/split-testing
